emails.subject: 2 things
emails.body: 2 things 1. What did you think of the story I slipped you? Ouch, huh! 2. The Electric Power Daily story was written by Jeff Ryser following your spirited lunch discussion last Friday.

emails.subject: Re: 2 things
emails.body: Re: 2 things Story bad but truthful...I feel like I'm closing in on peronal profile. Rick S. Sent: Mon Oct 22 17:26:06 2001

emails.subject: RE: 2 things
emails.body: RE: 2 things Fastow's personal profile, then it is all about you! I will get right on it... To: Philipp, Meredith
